name: Mahjong 16 TW
short_description: Enjoy the most authentic Taiwanese 16-Tile Mahjong anytime, anywhere! 🔹 Multiplayer & AI Matches – Play with friends online or challenge AI with four difficulty levels! 🔹 Voice Announcements – No need to stare at the screen, hear your opponents' moves instantly!
detailed_description:
This is a game designed specifically for Taiwanese 16-Tile Mahjong, allowing players to enjoy the most authentic mahjong experience anytime, anywhere!

🎮 Game Features

🔹 Mahjong Introduction & Tutorial – Even if you've never played Mahjong before, you can quickly get started with detailed tutorials and guided instructions!
🔹 Multiplayer Online Matches – Supports up to 4 players, so you can compete with friends and experience exciting mahjong battles!
🔹 Smart AI Opponents – Choose from four difficulty levels, ranging from beginner to expert, to match your skill level!
🔹 Voice Announcements – Stay focused on the game without staring at the screen – hear what tiles your opponents play through the voice system!
🔹 Career Mode – Track your game results and financial growth as you progress from a novice to a mahjong master!
🔹 Casual Mode – Want to relax? Enjoy stress-free games with no pressure, just pure mahjong fun!

Whether you're looking for competitive play or a casual gaming experience, this game has something for everyone! Come challenge Taiwanese 16-Tile Mahjong and enjoy the classic thrill of the game! 🎉

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, German
*languages with full audio support
